whyMe.title: Why Me
whyMe.description: I am a passionate frontend developer with a strong focus on creating engaging and user-friendly web applications. With a keen eye for design and a commitment to clean, efficient code, I strive to deliver exceptional digital experiences that meet both user needs and business goals.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: I am currently pursuing further training as a backend developer, which will enable me to work as a full stack developer upon completion.

project1.title: Jump & Run Game
project1.organisationTitle: How I have organised my work process
project1.about: An action-packed jump-and-run set in a secret energy laboratory that must be defended against enemy attacks.
project1.organisation: I broke the project down into clearly defined steps, tested and refactored regularly, and kept the growing codebase under control through short feedback loops and a consistent folder and class structure.
project1.takeaways: Built a modular, object-oriented JavaScript architecture with clearly separated responsibilities and gained hands-on experience with timing and state management, collision detection, keyboard events, and structured handling of assets and the DOM/canvas in a larger codebase.

project2.title: Kanban Board
project2.organisationTitle: How we have organised our work process
project2.about: A lightweight Kanban board to manage tasks with columns, drag & drop, quick edits, and an overview that stays readable even with many cards.
project2.organisation: We organised our work with weekly team meetings and a shared Kanban board, where we broke the project into small tasks, assigned clear responsibilities, and worked in short iterations to implement, test and refine each feature.
project2.takeaways: I learned to coordinate closely with three other developers, align on shared coding patterns, and give and receive concise, constructive feedback on each other’s work.

project3.title: Pokemon Card App
project3.organisationTitle: How I have organised my work process
project3.about: Minimalist Pokémon card app, one of my first projects – focusing on custom UI design and integration with the public Pokémon API.
project3.organisation: First, I analysed the API structure, then implemented the integration, mapped the data and adapted the UI components.
project3.takeaways: Clean integration of an external API, implementation of a search feature and mapping the data into reusable components, plus using Bootstrap and more refined CSS for clear, consistent, responsive designs.

colleagueFeedback.title: Need a team player? Here’s what my colleagues said about me

feedback1.name: Colleague Name
feedback1.quote: Marcel is highly reliable, communicates clearly, and delivers UI work fast without sacrificing quality. Great teammate in reviews and debugging.

feedback2.name: Colleague Name
feedback2.quote: He takes ownership, keeps tasks structured, and stays calm under pressure. Collaboration felt smooth and the handoffs were always clean.

feedback3.name: Colleague Name
feedback3.quote: Marcel is proactive and detail-oriented. He spots edge cases early and improves the overall UX with smart, simple solutions.

contactMe.title: Contact me
contactMe.intro: I’m happy to connect about job offers and exciting project opportunities. I work collaboratively, with a high level of accuracy and a clear goal-oriented mindset, and I have a strong eye for clean, aesthetic, user-friendly interfaces. I’m highly motivated and continuously improving — feel free to reach out via email or phone!

contactForm.privacyTextRight: and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice
legalNotice.acceptanceText: By accessing and using Portfolio (Product), you acknowledge and agree to the following terms and conditions, and any policies, guidelines, or amendments thereto that may be presented to you from time to time. We, the listed students, may update or change the terms and conditions from time to time without notice.
legalNotice.scopeTitle: Scope and ownership of the product
legalNotice.scopeText1: Portfolio has been developed as part of a student group project in a web development bootcamp at the Developer Akademie GmbH. It has an educational purpose and is not intended for extensive personal & business usage. As such, we cannot guarantee consistent availability, reliability, accuracy, or any other aspect of quality regarding this Product.
legalNotice.scopeText2: The design of Portfolio is owned by the Developer Akademie GmbH. Unauthorized use, reproduction, modification, distribution, or replication of the design is strictly prohibited.
legalNotice.rightsText: Aside from the design owned by Developer Akademie GmbH, we, the listed students, retain all proprietary rights in Portfolio, including any associated copyrighted material, trademarks, and other proprietary information.
legalNotice.useText: Portfolio is intended to be used for lawful purposes only, in accordance with all applicable laws and regulations. Any use of Portfolio for illegal activities, or to harass, harm, threaten, or intimidate another person, is strictly prohibited. You are solely responsible for your interactions with other users of Portfolio.
legalNotice.disclaimerTitle: Disclaimer of warranties and limitation of liability
legalNotice.disclaimerText: Portfolio is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. In no event will we, the listed students, or the Developer Akademie, be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or exemplary damages, including but not limited to, damages for loss of profits, goodwill, use, data, or other intangible losses, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages, arising out of or in connection with the use or performance of Portfolio.
legalNotice.indemnityText: You agree to indemnify, defend and hold harmless us, the listed students, the Developer Akademie, and our affiliates, partners, officers, directors, agents, and employees, from and against any claim, demand, loss, damage, cost, or liability (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or relating to your use of Portfolio and/or your breach of this Legal Notice.
legalNotice.questionsLine: For any questions or notices, please contact us at

privacyPolice.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolice.right1: Information about your stored data and its processing (Art. 15 GDPR)
privacyPolice.right2: Correction of incorrect personal data (Art. 16 GDPR)
privacyPolice.right3: Deletion of your stored data (Art. 17 GDPR)
privacyPolice.right4: Restriction of data processing if we are not allowed to delete your data due to legal obligations (Art. 18 GDPR)
privacyPolice.right5: Objection to the processing of your data (Art. 21 GDPR)
privacyPolice.right6: Data portability if you have consented to data processing or have concluded a contract with us (Art. 20 GDPR)
privacyPolice.withdrawal: You can revoke your consent at any time with effect for the future.
privacyPolice.authority: Complaints can be addressed to the competent supervisory authority: List of authorities.
privacyPolice.logfilesTitle: Collection of general information when visiting our website
privacyPolice.logfile1: Ensuring a trouble-free connection to the website
privacyPolice.logfile2: Ensuring smooth use of the website
privacyPolice.logfile3: Ensuring and evaluating system security and stability, especially for abuse detection
privacyPolice.logfile4: For technically error-free presentation and optimization of the website
privacyPolice.logfilesDuration: Server log files are stored for a maximum of 7 days.
privacyPolice.contact1: The data entered in the contact form is processed for the purpose of individual communication with you.
privacyPolice.contact2: The data will be deleted after processing.
privacyPolice.objectionTitle: Information about your right to object under Art. 21 GDPR
privacyPolice.objectionText: You have the right to object to the processing of your personal data at any time.
privacyPolice.questionsText: If you have any questions about data protection, please send us an email to the responsible person mentioned above.
privacyPolice.footer: This privacy policy was created with the help of activeMind AG.
